title: CustodyNote | PoliceStationRepUK — Find Accredited Police Station Reps

headings.text: The custody note app for freelance reps
One app for attendances, advice & billing
Your records are too important to risk
Less admin, more organised records, more time for clients
Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: Available NowDesktop App30-Day Free TrialThe custody note app for freelance repsBuilt for freelance police station representatives and criminal solicitors who attend stations on behalf of defence firms. Structured notes with LAA code support, time recording, firm billing, and PDF export — so you can focus on the client, not the admin.Supports LAA codesWorks offlineEncrypted backup🎁 Exclusive for PSR UK members — 25% off your subscriptionEnter code A2MJY2NQ at checkout on custodynote.comStart 30-Day Free Trial Visit custodynote.com →See pricing →No credit card for trial · Windows 10+ · From £15.99/mo · Cancel any timeCustody NoteSupports LAA CodesRecord-keeping readyUsed across England & Wales by freelance reps and solicitors · Version 1.4.93 record typesAttendance, Tel Advice & Quick Capture16 sectionsFull attendance form100% offlineAt any stationObject LockSecure cloud backup (AWS)Everything a Freelance Rep NeedsOne app for attendances, advice & billingRecord in-person attendances and telephone advice from one home screen. Quick Capture lets you grab initial case details the moment you get the call.Telephone AdviceINVB / TelephoneRecord INVB telephone advice sessions from one home screen. Structured notes with LAA code support. For when you advise without attending in person.Quick CaptureGrab details on the goCapture client name, station, offence, times and key details the moment you get the call. Save as draft or expand into the full attendance form when you reach the station.Full AttendanceComplete 16-section recordFull in-person attendance note with custody record, PACE review times, disclosure, consultation, interview, outcome, fees, LAA declaration and supervisor review — all in one record.Complete Coverage16 sections. One form. No switching.Client details, offence picker with type-ahead search, disclosure and OIC fields, 1st/2nd/3rd PACE review times (due and actual), arrest & detention, welfare and vulnerability, consultation, interview, outcome, time recording, fees, LAA codes and declarations — all in a single record.Navigate with Previous/Next or jump to any section. From instruction to outcome to PDF — no copying between systems. Export notes to PDF for your firms and clients.1Case Reference & Arrival2Journey to Station3Custody Record4Offences5Disclosure & Evidence6Consultation7Interview8Outcome9Time Recording & Fees10LAA Declaration11Admin & Billing12Consents & Retainer13Third Party Authority14Authorities (Solicitor, Medical, Other)15Communications Log16Supervisor ReviewLAA Record-Keeping SupportDesigned to support LAA record-keepingLAA outcome codes, stage reached, and fee codes built in. Structured notes and time records designed to support Legal Aid Agency record-keeping expectations.LAA outcome codes, stage reached, and fee codes built inStructured notes and time records designed to support LAA record-keeping expectationsSufficient benefit test (LAA) built into the formPACE reviews — 1st, 2nd & 3rd review times (due and actual)Fee rates updated to Standard Crime Contract 2025 (£320 fixed fee, £650 escape)DSCC PIN in PDF headers and billingClient and fee earner declarations with signature padsAutomatic escape fee detectionEditable fee rates (fixed fee, attendance, travel, mileage, VAT)Local encrypted backup every 2 minutes + optional cloud backupSecure Cloud BackupYour records are too important to riskCloud Backup encrypts your database on your machine and uploads it to a UK data centre. Backups are protected by AWS Object Lock, which is designed to guard against unauthorised alteration or deletion. Per-subscriber data isolation.Encrypted BackupYour database is encrypted on your machine before uploadFully OfflineRuns on your machine — works at any station without Wi-FiYour Data, Your MachineData stays on your device — no firm or third party controls your filesCloud Backup (£19.99/mo)UK data centre (AWS London) with Object Lock — designed to guard against unauthorised alterationWhy Freelance Reps Use Custody NoteLess admin, more organised records, more time for clientsFirm Tracking & BillingLog which firm instructed each case. Track disbursements with VAT treatment, time recording, and LAA fee codes so you can bill every firm accurately.Bill Every Firm AccuratelyTrack which firm instructed each case, record time and disbursements with VAT, and export everything you need to invoice.Reports & AnalyticsReports by month, year, firm, station, and escape fee cases — see your work at a glance.Save Hours Every WeekStructured templates, quick capture, and one-click PDF export mean less rework and no duplicate typing.PDF ExportExport notes to PDF for your firms and clients — professional, formatted, and ready to send.Simple PricingSubscription only — no per-seat charges, no hidden fees, no firm approval needed.
